💌 Open When Sad...
_
□
✕
Hey love... If you're reading this, you're probably having a hard day or something must be bothering you. But listen — breathe its our space, we'll get better we still have to visit those blue glowy beaches Heck ill burn a hundred paper lanterns so u wont feel sad anymore Mwahhhhh! Here - 8003771977 Call me. We would kiss or we could just sit and everything will be fine :3 You've gotten through every hard day before this one. And you'll get through this one too. I love you more than words. ♡ I love everything about you. Please remember: you are SO loved. ♡ – always yours, forever ♡
💜 💖 💗
📝 Love Notes — Notepad ♡
_
□
✕
FileEditViewHelp ♡
100 things I love about you:

1. Your smile when ur trying not to laugh 🌸
2. The way your eyes smile when you get shy 💜
3. How your voice changes when ur excited ✨
4. Your random little ragebait comments 🌙
5. The way you care deeply even when you act nonchalant 💖
6. Your sincerity towards the things you love ⭐
7. The way you notice tiny details 🎀
8. How your presence makes ordinary moments feel soft 🌷
9. Your kiss texts at night ☁️
10. The way you secretly want affection even when you deny it ♡
11. Your laugh when something genuinely catches you off guard 🌼
12. The way you hold my hand sometimes 🌸
13. How pretty you look every morning🎧
14. Your eyes when you stare at me for too long 🌙
15. The way you tease me just to see my reaction 💫
16. Your stubbornness even when it drives me insane 🌷
17. The little expressions you make while talking 💜
18. How your hair looks after a long day ✨
19. The way you walk beside me quietly 🌧️
20. Your soft side that you pretend doesnt exist 🫶
21. The way you care about people deeply but silently 🌸
22. How cute you look when embarrassed 🌙
23. The way you try to act unaffected and fail 💖
24. Your random midnight thoughts ☁️
25. The comfort of just sitting beside you 🌷
26. How your eyes light up over little things ✨
27. The way you look while concentrating 🎀
28. Your sleepy face🌼
29. How naturally beautiful you are 🌸
30. BLEHH i love you ♡
31. Your taste in things 🎧
32. The way you get shy when i say lets kiss 💜
33. Your cute anger 😭
34. The way you randomly become soft 🌙
35. How warm your hugs feel 🌷
36. Your honesty, even when its harsh ⭐
37. The way you look at me when I say something stupid ✨
38. Your sleepy voice ☁️
39. The way you act tough but feel deeply 🌸
40. Your whole energy honestly 💖
41. How pretty you look in dim lights 🌙
42. The way your pupils get huge when you stare at me ✨
43. How safe your presence feels sometimes 🌷
44. The way you randomly smile while reading something 💜
45. How much I love hearing your voice 🌼
46. The way you sit beside me quietly and still make me happy ☁️
47. Your soft cheeks 😭
48. The way you say “fuck you” but dont mean it 🎀
49. How real our conversations feel 🌸
50. The way time disappears around you ♡
51. Your little dramatic reactions 🌙
52. How you pretend you dont care but actually do 💖
53. The way you look while fixing your hair ✨
54. Your sleepy late-night honesty ☁️
55. The way you get attached to tiny memories 🌷
56. Your random cute aggression 😭
57. How adorable your eye contact is 💜
58. The way you lean into me rarely 🌸
59. Your laugh during dumb jokes 🌼
60. When u put ur hand on my thigh to calm me down🌙
61. The way you look while listening carefully ✨
62. Your little habits that nobody else notices 🎀
63. The way you make me miss you instantly ☁️
64. Your soft voice when you’re tired 🌷
65. The way you get excited over random things 🌸
66. Your pretty hands 💖
67. The way you blush and deny it 💜
68. Your emotional sincerity ⭐
69. The comfort in your silence 🌙
70. i just fucking love you ✨
71. How naturally cute you are 🌼
72. Your bad humour 😭
73. The way you secretly enjoy affection 🌷
74. Your eyes. Always your eyes. 💜
75. The way you stay in my mind all day ☁️
76. How adorable you look while thinking🌸
77. The way you notice when something feels off 🌙
78. Your when we get in trouble 😭
79. The way your laugh feels addictive ✨
80. How pretty you look doing absolutely nothing ♡
81. Your random bursts of softness 🌷
82. The way you get shy after kissing me 💖
83. and then how u kiss me harder🎀
84. The way your presence slows everything down 🌸
85. always you hitting me😭
86. How naturally lovable you are ☁️
87. The way your smile stays in my head 🌙
88. Your cute little eye rolls 💜
89. The way you make ordinary days worth it✨
90. Your warmth, hehe inside ur tshirt too 🌼
91. The way you let me sit close🌷
92. How your eyes search for mine in crowds 💖
93. The way you make me want to be gentler 🌸
94. Your laugh when you genuinely forget to hold it back ✨
95. ur height ☁️
96. The way you make me feel lucky sometimes 🌙
97. Your existence honestly 😭
98. Loving u is the best thing i ever had 💜
99. Every tiny version of you I keep noticing 🌷
100. You. Just you. Always you. ♡

💝 For You — A Message
_
□
✕
💝🌙✨💜🌸
I made this whole little world
just for you, because you deserve
something as magical
as you make my life feel. ♡

Every day with you feels like
the best dream I never want
to wake up from.

Thank you for existing. ♡
Thank you for being mine.
🎀💖🐱💜🌙
